name: the-nurture
description: My-Chat framework scenario module for pregnancy, motherhood, childcare, family strategy, activity comparison, and review-driven parenting workflows.

scripts.prepare:pinned-source: pnpm verify:workflow-contract-pin && pnpm --dir ../My-Workflow-Base/templates/web-workbench install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --dir ../My-Workflow-Base/templates/web-workbench build
scripts.build: pnpm prepare:pinned-source && pnpm db:generate:all && pnpm typecheck && pnpm --filter @the-nurture/frontend build
scripts.test:db: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec vitest run -c vitest.db.config.ts
scripts.test:db:ci: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec vitest run -c vitest.db.config.ts --reporter=json --outputFile=.ai/.tmp/test-results/production-db.json
scripts.test:dev-host: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec vitest run -c vitest.dev-host.config.ts
scripts.test:dev-host:ci: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec vitest run -c vitest.dev-host.config.ts --reporter=json --outputFile=.ai/.tmp/test-results/dev-host.json
scripts.test:all: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:db && pnpm test:dev-host
scripts.db:generate: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:validate: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma validate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:deploy: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.dev-host:db:generate: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma generate --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.dev-host:db:validate: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma validate --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.dev-host:db:migrate: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.dev-host:db:deploy: node scripts/run-with-local-env.mjs pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma
